subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness sent down from God, the One, the Incomparable, the Single, calling mankind unto Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس نزلت من لدی الله الواحد الفرد الاحد و یدعو الناس الی فردوس
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @living waters; water of life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
